ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terrain_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terrain profile */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the terrain profile */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the terrain profile in meters */,
  "land_cover" TEXT /* Land cover type (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "obstacles" TEXT /* Obstacles present in the terrain profile (e.g., buildings, trees) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the terrain profile */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the terrain profile */,
  "area" REAL /* Area covered by the terrain profile in square kilometers */,
  "terrain_image" TEXT /* Binary data for a map or image of the terrain profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atmospheric condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "air_pressure" REAL /* Air pressure in hPa */,
  "gas_composition" TEXT /* Gas composition (e.g., nitrogen, oxygen, carbon dioxide) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the atmospheric condition was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antenna_characteristics" (
  "antenna_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antenna characteristic */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the antenna in GHz */,
  "gain" REAL /* Gain of the antenna in dBi */,
  "polarization" TEXT /* Polarization of the antenna (e.g., horizontal, vertical) */,
  "directionality" TEXT /* Directionality of the antenna (e.g., omnidirectional, directional) */,
  "antenna_type" TEXT /* Type of antenna (e.g., dipole, parabolic) */,
  "beamwidth" REAL /* Beamwidth of the antenna in degrees */,
  "vswr" REAL /* Voltage Standing Wave Ratio */,
  "impedance" REAL /* Impedance of the antenna in ohms */,
  "antenna_image" TEXT /* Binary data for an image of the antenna */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antenna_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radio_propagation_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radio propagation model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the radio propagation model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the radio propagation model */,
  "model_author" TEXT /* Author of the radio propagation model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_reference" TEXT /* Reference or citation for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "path_loss_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each path loss calculation */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terrain profile used in the calculation */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the atmospheric condition used in the calculation */,
  "antenna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antenna characteristic used in the calculation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radio propagation model used in the calculation */,
  "path_loss" REAL /* Result of the path loss calculation in dB */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the transmitter and receiver in meters */,
  "transmitter_power" REAL /* Transmitter power in dBm */,
  "receiver_sensitivity" REAL /* Receiver sensitivity in dBm */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_path_loss_calculations_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES terrain_profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_path_loss_calculations_antenna_id FOREIGN KEY ("antenna_id") REFERENCES antenna_characteristics ("antenna_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_path_loss_calculations_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_path_loss_calculations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES radio_propagation_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Project status (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project in dollars */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Name of the project leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the result belongs to */,
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the path loss calculation the result is based on */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., path loss, antenna performance) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analysis */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the analysis in percentage */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_calculation_id FOREIGN KEY ("calculation_id") REFERENCES path_loss_calculations ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
